languages.text: {n}Эоганн прикрывает органический глаз, погрузившись в глубокую думу. Наконец, он расплывается в улыбке.{/n} "Благодарю, {name}. Вот оно, решение нашей дилеммы. Приступаю к процедуре триасомии. Да будет достигнуто тождество плоти органической и священной машинерии!"

{n}Eogunn closes his organic eye, deep in thought. Finally, his face breaks into a smile.{/n} "Thank you, {name}. This is it, the solution to our dilemma. I will begin the triasomia procedure. May organic flesh and sacred machinery be one!"
languages.original_text: {n}Эоганн прикрывает органический глаз, погрузившись в глубокую думу. Наконец, он расплывается в улыбке.{/n} "Благодарю, {name}. Вот оно, решение нашей дилеммы. Приступаю к процедуре триасомии. Да будет достигнуто тождество плоти органической и священной машинерии!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn closes his organic eye, deep in thought. Finally, his face breaks into a smile.{/n} "Thank you, {name}. This is it, the solution to our dilemma. I will begin the triasomia procedure. May organic flesh and sacred machinery be one!"

{n}Eogunn closes his organic eye, deep in thought. Finally, his face breaks into a smile.{/n} "Thank you, {name}. This is it, the solution to our dilemma. I will begin the triasomia procedure. May organic flesh and sacred chrome be one!"

{n}Eogunn closes his organic eye, deep in thought. Finally, his face breaks into a smile.{/n} "Thank you, {name}. This is it, the solution to our dilemma. I will begin the triasomia procedure. May organic flesh and sacred chrome be one!"

{n}Eogunn closes his organic eye, deep in thought. Finally, his face breaks into a smile.{/n} "Thank you, {name}. This is it, the solution to our dilemma. I will begin the triasomia procedure. May organic flesh and sacred machinery be one!"

languages.text: {n}エオガンは有機眼を閉じて深く考え込む。そしてついに、彼の顔は笑顔に満ちた。 {/n}「{name}、ありがとう。これは我々のジレンマの解決策だ。トライアスミアの儀式を始めよう。有機の肉と神聖なクロムが一つになることを祈る！」
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn closes his organic eye, deep in thought. Finally, his face breaks into a smile.{/n} "Thank you, {name}. This is it, the solution to our dilemma. I will begin the triasomia procedure. May organic flesh and sacred chrome be one!"

traits.locale_text: エオグンは有機眼を閉じて深く考え込む。そしてついに、彼の顔は笑顔に満ちた。 "{name}、ありがとう。これは我々のジレンマの解決策だ。トライアスミアの儀式を始めよう。有機の肉と神聖なクロムが一つになることを祈る！"

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡闭上他的有机肉眼，陷入深思。终于，他的脸上绽出笑容。{/n}“谢谢您，{name}。就是这个，这就是解决我们困境的办法。我这就开始三相融合程序。愿有机血肉与神圣机械合而为一！”
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn closes his organic eye, deep in thought. Finally, his face breaks into a smile.{/n} "Thank you, {name}. This is it, the solution to our dilemma. I will begin the triasomia procedure. May organic flesh and sacred machinery be one!"

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡闭上他的有机肉眼，陷入深思。终于，他的脸上绽出笑容。{/n}“谢谢您，{name}。就是这个，这就是解决我们困境的办法。我这就开始三相融合程序。愿有机血肉与神圣机械合而为一！”

languages.text: {n}Eogunn cierra su ojo orgánico, sumido en sus pensamientos. Después de un tiempo, su rostro se ilumina con una sonrisa.{/n} «Gracias, {name}. Esta es la solución a nuestro dilema. Comenzaré de inmediato el procedimiento triasómico. ¡Que la carne orgánica y la sagrada maquinaria sean uno!».
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn closes his organic eye, deep in thought. Finally, his face breaks into a smile.{/n} "Thank you, {name}. This is it, the solution to our dilemma. I will begin the triasomia procedure. May organic flesh and sacred machinery be one!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn cierra su ojo orgánico, sumido en sus pensamientos. Después de un tiempo, su rostro se ilumina con una sonrisa.{/n} «Gracias, {name}. Esta es la solución a nuestro dilema. Comenzaré de inmediato el procedimiento triasómico. ¡Que la carne orgánica y la sagrada maquinaria sean uno!».

languages.text: {n}Eogunn schließt in Gedanken versunken sein organisches Auge. Schließlich weitet sich sein Gesicht zu einem Lächeln.{/n} "Danke, {name}. Das ist sie, die Lösung unseres Dilemmas. Ich beginne jetzt mit der Triasomiaprozedur. Mögen organisches Fleisch und heilige Maschinerie eins werden!"
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn closes his organic eye, deep in thought. Finally, his face breaks into a smile.{/n} "Thank you, {name}. This is it, the solution to our dilemma. I will begin the triasomia procedure. May organic flesh and sacred machinery be one!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn schließt in Gedanken versunken sein organisches Auge. Schließlich weitet sich sein Gesicht zu einem Lächeln.{/n} "Danke, {name}. Das ist sie, die Lösung unseres Dilemmas. Ich beginne jetzt mit der Triasomiaprozedur. Mögen organisches Fleisch und heilige Maschinerie eins werden!"

languages.text: {n}Eogunn ferme son œil organique et se plonge dans ses pensées pendant un moment, puis il sourit.{/n} « Merci, {name}. Nous tenons enfin la solution à notre dilemme. Je vais commencer la procédure de triasomia sans plus attendre. Que la chair organique et les mécanismes sacrés ne fassent plus qu'un ! »
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn closes his organic eye, deep in thought. Finally, his face breaks into a smile.{/n} "Thank you, {name}. This is it, the solution to our dilemma. I will begin the triasomia procedure. May organic flesh and sacred machinery be one!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn ferme son œil organique et se plonge dans ses pensées pendant un moment, puis il sourit.{/n} « Merci, {name}. Nous tenons enfin la solution à notre dilemme. Je vais commencer la procédure de triasomia sans plus attendre. Que la chair organique et les mécanismes sacrés ne fassent plus qu'un ! »

languages.text: {n}Eogunn, derin düşüncelere dalarak organik gözünü kapatıyor. Sonunda yüzünde bir gülümseme beliriyor.{/n}"Teşekkür ederim. İşte bu, ikilemimizin çözümü. Üçyeközleştirme prosedürüne başlayacağım. Organik et ve kutsal makine bir olsun!"
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn closes his organic eye, deep in thought. Finally, his face breaks into a smile.{/n} "Thank you, {name}. This is it, the solution to our dilemma. I will begin the triasomia procedure. May organic flesh and sacred machinery be one!"
